---
title: "Donegal's Architectural Heritage"
description: |
  Having a look at some of the historical buildings in Donegal, thanks to data from the National Inventory of Architectural Heritage. Also a chance to check out crosstalk and leafpop.
author:
  - name: Eugene
    url: https://fizzics.netliffy.app
date: 08-29-2021
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
preview: img/oakpark.jpg
---

  
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(plotly)
library(crosstalk)
library(htmltools)
library(leaflet)
library(leafpop)
library(RColorBrewer)

# https://www.buildingsofireland.ie/resources/
```

```{r data, echo=F, warning=F, message=F}
donegal <- read_csv("data/Ulster.csv") %>% 
  select(NAME, TOWNLAND, DATEFROM, WEBSITE_LINK, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, IMAGE_LINK, ORIGINAL_TYPE, COUNTY) %>% 
  filter(COUNTY == "Donegal") %>% 
  mutate(NAME = NAME %>% iconv(from = "UTF-8", to = "UTF-8", sub = ""),
         NAME = ifelse(is.na(NAME), TOWNLAND, NAME),
         DATEFROM = as.numeric(DATEFROM),
         ORIGINAL_TYPE = ORIGINAL_TYPE %>% iconv(from = "UTF-8", to = "UTF-8", sub = ""))

```


```{r, echo = FALSE}
donegal_df <- SharedData$new(donegal)
pal <- colorFactor("Paired", domain=(donegal$ORIGINAL_TYPE))

donegal_map <- donegal_df %>% 
  leaflet() %>% 
  addProviderTiles("Esri.NatGeoWorldMap") %>%
  addCircles(lat = ~LATITUDE,
             lng = ~LONGITUDE,
             popup = ~paste0("<b>", NAME, "</b>",
                             "<br><i>", DATEFROM, "</i>: ",
                             ORIGINAL_TYPE, "<br>"),
             group = "sites",
             col = ~pal(ORIGINAL_TYPE)) %>%
  setView(lng = -7.7, lat = 55, zoom=10) %>% 
  addPopupImages(image = donegal$IMAGE_LINK, 
                 group = "sites", 
                 width = 150)


reactable_table <-  reactable(
  donegal_df,
  columns = list(
    NAME = colDef("Name"),
    TOWNLAND = colDef("Townland"),
    DATEFROM = colDef("Year"),
    WEBSITE_LINK = colDef("website"),
    LATITUDE = colDef("Latitude", show = FALSE),
    LONGITUDE = colDef("Longitude", show = FALSE),
    IMAGE_LINK = colDef("Image", show = FALSE),
    ORIGINAL_TYPE = colDef("Type", show = FALSE),
    LATITUDE = colDef("Latitude", show = FALSE),
    COUNTY = colDef("County", show = FALSE))
)
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
div(
  h1("Donegal Historic Buildings"),
  h3("Filter by Year"),
#  br(),
  filter_slider("year", "Year", donegal_df, ~DATEFROM, width = 500),
  br(),
  donegal_map,
  br(),
  reactable_table
)
```
